baseUrl.label: SearXNG URL
baseUrl.description: Base URL of your SearXNG instance (default: http://127.0.0.1:8888)

categories.label: Categories
categories.description: Comma-separated categories to search (defaults to "general" for this engine).

engines.label: Engines
engines.description: Comma-separated engine names to use (e.g. "google,duckduckgo,wikipedia"). Leave empty for all enabled.
